voice-guide:
Writing style rules for {{ author_name }}:
1. Tone: {{ voice_tone }} 2. Perspective: {{ voice_perspective }} 3. Always explain technical terms on first use 4. Use concrete examples, not abstract statements 5. Active voice preferred
BANNED phrases: - "game-changer", "revolutionary", "exciting times" - "it's worth noting", "it should be noted" - "in today's world", "in the digital age" - Passive constructions when active works
Language: {{ primary_language_name }}
